'''Arber''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the service of the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. At the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]], Lieutenant Arber was in charge of the [[gravitic amplitude modulator]] fitted to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Defiant (Imperial-class)|''Defiant'']], a device capable of jamming [[yammosk]] war-coordinating signals. He was successful in using the GAM against one yammosk, helping lead the ''Defiant'' to that warship-analog's destruction.

{{Char-stub}}
